text:
is a Scout Regiment soldier.

Appearance

Gunther has brown eyes and hair. He wears the Scout Regiment uniform.

Story

When Commander Erwin Smith tries to get closer to his subordinates, he first approaches Eld and Gunther who are taking care of the horses and makes jokes but the two soldiers are confused. Later on, Erwin comes back after a makeover and shows it to Gunther and his teammates but they remain uneasy.
